features: BIC Mens Razors for Shaving; Pack of 4 Flex3 BIC razors for men featuring triple moveable razer blade technology for a close efficient shave; The ultimate face razors for men who want a close finish
Mens Razor with Nano-Tech Technology; The 3 nano-tech blades on our razor heads individually adjust to the contours of your face for an extra smooth shave, plus these men's razors rinse off easily
Face Razor with Optimal Precision; Our Flex 3 face shaver has pivoting heads that move with you for targeted precision, even in those hard-to-reach areas; An essential in any mens shaving kit
Razor Blade Lubricated to Glide Smoothly; Your skin will enjoy the soothing glide of our facial razor and it's twin lubricating strip enriched with Vitamin E and Aloe Vera; Razors men will appreciate
Shavers for Men with Comfortable Gripped Handles; You're in control with the ergonomic heavy curved handle and soft rubber grip; Razor blades men will find comfortable to hold and accurate to use
description: Product Description The BIC Flex 3 men's razor with movable blades is a premium quality product. If you're looking for a comfortable razor for a softer and closer shave than the BIC 3 fixed blade shaver, this is the one for you. A large guard bar has a skin stretching effect, making for a smooth shave. A pivoting razor head follows your contours providing a comfortable and fluid shaving experience. BIC Flex 3 is the result of dedicated research and development. It features a heavy handle for optimum control and 3 independent, easy-to-rinse spring-mounted blades. It is designed to distribute and absorb blade pressure on skin. Ingredients PEG-115M, Tocopherol, Polysorbate 20, Aloe Barbadensis, BHT Directions 1. The razor can be used easily and safely, even on sensitive skin. 2. The swinging head adapts to the body. 3. The blades move independently to shave bumps without causing injury. 4. The wide lubricating strip with aloe vera and vitamin E allows a smooth glide over the skin. 5. The large, rubberised and ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip and flexibility. 6. The blades can be used for up to 1.5 months. 7. The razor is ideal for beard or intimate shaving. Box Contains 4 x BIC Flex3 Men's Razors See more
